description: Style NoteNothing matters whether it is a Monday morning or a Friday afternoon when it comes to comfort taking the front seat. These trousers from indian terrain diminish all your worries as you glide in and out of work. Inspired by American sportswear, your appearance will always be one to contend with, so go ahead and create your own niche with comfort.Product DetailsBlue trousers that have a flat front, comfortable waistband with loops, two insert pockets on either sides, two welt pockets with buttoned closures at the back, brand badge above the back pocket on the right with a buttoned and zipped closure on the front with extendible hemsMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim Fit low riseThe model (height:6' and waist: 32") is wearing a size 32
